Custom Clothing Manufacturing for UK Brands in Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

UK clothing brands face a unique challenge: high domestic manufacturing costs (£25-40/hour labor) versus the need for competitive retail pricing. Pakistan offers the solution. With labor costs 80% lower than the UK, a skilled garment workforce, and the DCTS (Developing Countries Trading Scheme) providing duty advantages, Pakistan is increasingly the preferred manufacturing destination for British brands. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom clothing for UK brands with MOQ from 50 pieces and shipping to the UK in just 5-7 days.

Why UK Brands Choose Pakistan

DCTS Duty Advantages

The UK's Developing Countries Trading Scheme eliminates or reduces import duties on goods from Pakistan. For clothing imports, this can mean 0-6% duty compared to 12-16% from non-DCTS countries. For a £10,000 order, that's £600-1,000 in savings.

English-Speaking Workforce

Pakistan's business community is fluent in English. At FABRIOZA, all our client communication is in English — no translation barriers, no miscommunication on specifications.

Quality Standards

Our ISO 9001 certification meets international standards recognized by UK retailers. We produce garments that pass UK trading standards for labeling, safety, and quality.

Time Zone Compatibility

Pakistan is just 4-5 hours ahead of UK time (GMT+5). This means real-time communication during UK business hours — unlike China (8 hours ahead) or Bangladesh (6 hours ahead).

Shipping to the UK

MethodTimeCost (per kg)Best For
DHL Express5-7 days£8-12Urgent orders, samples
Air Freight7-10 days£5-8Medium orders (50-500 pcs)
Sea Freight28-35 days£1-2Large orders (1000+ pcs)

UK-Specific Services

  • UK Sizing: We manufacture to UK size standards (8-22 for women, S-XXL for men)
  • Care Labels: EU regulation-compliant care labels in English
  • VAT Documentation: Full export documentation for UK customs
  • EORI Support: We provide all paperwork needed for your EORI number
  • UK Payment: Accept GBP via bank transfer and Wise

UK Brand Success Stories

We've worked with 40+ UK-based brands ranging from London streetwear labels to Manchester gym wear startups. One Brighton-based fitness brand started with 50 pieces and now orders 2,000+ pieces quarterly across 8 SKUs. A Birmingham streetwear label launched their first collection with us and sold out within 3 weeks.
